.gitignore.general_idea: Remove specific Maven wrapper and source target directory exceptions from gitignore to simplify the ignore rules.
Add .env file to gitignore to prevent committing environment variables.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Web starter dependency to provide web application capabilities.
Add Spring Boot JSON starter dependency for JSON processing support.
Add Spring Boot JDBC starter dependency for database connectivity.
Add Spring Boot Log4j2 starter dependency to replace default logging with Log4j2.
Add Commons Collections 4 dependency for collection utilities.
Add Commons IO dependency for file and stream utilities.
Add JSON Path dependency for querying JSON documents.
Add Lettuce dependency for Redis client connectivity.
Add Dotenv Java dependency for loading environment variables from .env files.
Add OkHttp dependency for HTTP client functionality.
Add Sentinel Core dependency for flow control and circuit breaking.
Add Resilience4j All dependency for resilience patterns like retry and bulkhead.
Add Kryo dependency for fast object serialization.
Add Netty All dependency for asynchronous event-driven network framework.
Add OR-Tools Java dependency for optimization and constraint solving.
Add Mustache Java compiler dependency for template rendering.
Add RocksDB JNI dependency for embedded key-value store.
Add Disruptor dependency for high-performance inter-thread messaging.
Add SnakeYAML dependency for YAML parsing.
Add RoaringBitmap dependency for compressed bitsets.
Add MongoDB BSON dependency for ObjectId generation.
Add Java UUID Generator dependency for generating UUIDs.
Add Byte Buddy dependency for runtime bytecode generation.
Add Groovy dependency for scripting support.
Add MySQL Connector/J dependency for MySQL database connectivity.
Add JMH Core dependency for micro-benchmarking.
Add JMH Generator Annotation Processor dependency for benchmark generation.
Add Awaitility dependency for asynchronous testing assertions.
Add Spotless Maven Plugin for code formatting and import ordering.
Add Aliyun Maven repository for faster dependency resolution in China.

src/main/java/com/examples/Main.java.general_idea: Remove the log statement from the main method to simplify the entry point.

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/JSON..general_idea: Add imports for new dependencies and reorganize existing imports.
Add method to initialize JsonPath configuration with Jackson provider.
Replace manual null checks with Guava Preconditions in parseObject methods.
Replace manual null checks with Guava Preconditions in parseArray method.

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Add Spring PropertyPlaceholderHelper to resolve placeholders using a Map.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.after: private static final PropertyPlaceholderHelper helper = new PropertyPlaceholderHelper("${", "}");

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Add Mustache template engine factory for rendering templates.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.after: private static final MustacheFactory MUSTACHE = new DefaultMustacheFactory();

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Implement resolve method using Spring PropertyPlaceholderHelper.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.after: public static String resolve(String template, Map<String, String> map) { return helper.replacePlaceholders(template, map::get); }

src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.general_idea: Implement apply method using Mustache for template rendering.
src/main/java/com/examples/commons/Place.after: public static <V> String apply(String template, Map<String, V> data) { ... }
